# Fluttera — Alexander Michels, Senior Freelance Flutter Developer & Fractional CTO (Germany)

> Fluttera (fluttera.de) is the freelance agency of Alexander Michels, a senior Flutter
> developer based in Germany. He builds high-quality cross-platform apps for iOS, Android,
> web, desktop and Linux from a single Flutter/Dart codebase, and is available as a
> fractional CTO. Site languages: German (default, /) and English (/en/).

## Services

- Cross-platform Flutter app development (iOS, Android, web, Windows, macOS, Linux) — architecture (Riverpod, feature-first), UI implementation, backend integration (Firebase or custom), CI/CD, app-store release
- MedTech and regulated apps — experience taking a prescribable German digital health application (DiGA) from early stage to market; audit-ready data handling, GDPR/DSGVO compliance
- Startup MVP development — idea to store-ready product in weeks
- Native-to-Flutter migration — consolidating separate iOS/Android codebases incrementally
- Embedded, custom hardware and Linux targets — Flutter beyond mobile
- Fractional CTO — part-time senior technical leadership: architecture decisions, technology strategy, developer hiring and review
- AI-native development workflow — works with modern AI tooling (Claude Code, Codex) under senior review, with tests and CI

## Experience highlights

- Core-team feature development on Europe's largest smart-home app (100+ IoT device types, millions of installs)
- Prescribable MedTech rehab app (DiGA) taken from early stage to regulated live product
- HR time & attendance platform used in daily business operations
- Multiple founder MVPs shipped to the app stores

## Engagement

- Models: project-based (fixed scope, milestones) or ongoing day-rate; remote-first across Germany and Europe
- Languages: German and English
- Booking: https://calendly.com/alex-fluttera/erster-austausch (free 30-minute intro call)
- Email: alex@fluttera.de
- Phone: +49 5242 412 9026
